languages.text: "А нашего нового сержанта-инструктора Данкоша оттеснили к дороге к ксеноруинам, на северо-западе от посадочной площадки".
"And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."
languages.original_text: "А нашего нового сержанта-инструктора Данкоша оттеснили к дороге к ксеноруинам, на северо-западе от посадочной площадки".

traits.locale_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."
"And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."
"And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."

languages.text: 「そして、新しいドリル・サージェント・ダンコシュは、着陸パッドの北西にある異星遺跡への道に追いやられました」
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."

traits.locale_text: 「そして、新しいドリル・サージェント・ダンコシュは、着陸パッドの北西にある異星遺跡への道に追いやられました」

languages.text: «El nuevo sargento de instrucción, Dankosh, ha tenido que retroceder al camino hacia las xenorruinas, al noroeste de la plataforma».
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."

traits.locale_text: «El nuevo sargento de instrucción, Dankosh, ha tenido que retroceder al camino hacia las xenorruinas, al noroeste de la plataforma».

languages.text: "Und unser neuer Drill Sergeant Dankosh wurde an die Straße zu den Xenoruinen nordwestlich der Landeplattform zurückgedrängt."
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."

traits.locale_text: "Und unser neuer Drill Sergeant Dankosh wurde an die Straße zu den Xenoruinen nordwestlich der Landeplattform zurückgedrängt."

languages.text: « Notre nouveau sergent-instructeur Dankosh a été repoussé sur la route qui mène aux xénoruines situées au nord-ouest de la plateforme d'atterrissage. »
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."

traits.locale_text: « Notre nouveau sergent-instructeur Dankosh a été repoussé sur la route qui mène aux xénoruines situées au nord-ouest de la plateforme d'atterrissage. »

languages.text: “我们的新任操练军士丹科什已被逼退至着陆平台西北方向，通往异形遗迹的道路一线。”
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."

traits.locale_text: “我们的新任操练军士丹科什已被逼退至着陆平台西北方向，通往异形遗迹的道路一线。”

languages.text: "Yeni Talim Çavuşumuz Dankosh da iniş pistinin kuzeybatısındaki zeno harabelerine giden yola püskürtüldü."
languages.original_text: "And our new Drill Sergeant Dankosh has been pushed back to the road to the xenoruins, north-west of the landing pad."

traits.locale_text: "Yeni Talim Çavuşumuz Dankosh da iniş pistinin kuzeybatısındaki zeno harabelerine giden yola püskürtüldü."
